_schema.description: Grouped measurement data for error bar chart. Each record represents one experimental group or category. Provide mean and at least one uncertainty measure. Replace with your real aggregated data — error bars require pre-computed statistics, not raw observations.

fields.sd: number — standard deviation (symmetric spread around mean)
fields.se: number — standard error of the mean (sd / sqrt(n))
fields.ci95_lo: number — lower bound of 95% confidence interval
fields.ci95_hi: number — upper bound of 95% confidence interval
fields.min: number — minimum observed value in group
fields.max: number — maximum observed value in group

_schema.replace: Swap these records with your real group statistics. If your data is asymmetric (skewed distributions), provide distinct ci95_lo and ci95_hi rather than relying on sd.
